Procs

                               forbids: [].}
Returns the Singleton instance of the Logger service

                       initShared`gensym0`gensym5: static bool = true): ptr Logger
Retrieve the singleton instance of the service 
proc init() {....raises: [IOError, ValueError, Exception],
              tags: [TimeEffect, WriteIOEffect, RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Initializes the Logger service by creating the logs directory if it doesn't exist

Templates

template logger(message: string; level: LogLevel = INFO)
Logs a message using the Logger service. The message can be a string or any expression that evaluates to a string. The level specifies the log level (e.g., INFO, ERROR), and autoNewLine determines whether to automatically add a newline after the message

Exports

LogLevel, other, header, logsFolder=, InstantiationInfo, fatal, warn, $, log, logsFolder, error, trace, debug, initLogit, log, info, finish, Logit, start
